_publications._publicationTitle: PET Imaging of Neurofibromatosis Type 1 with a Fluorine-18 Labeled Tryptophan Radiotracer.

_contextSnippet: The IHC results showed that the NF1 tumors had high IDO, TDO2, and AHR expressions...However, both brain and muscle showed low IDO and TDO2 expressions
resourceName: indoleamine 2,3-dioxygenase rabbit monoclonal (1:100, Abcam, Cambridge, UK)
details: Successfully demonstrated high IDO expression in NF1 tumors and low expression in brain and muscle tissues through immunohistochemical analysis
